summary: Scaffolding meets all spec requirements from task-1.md and infrastructure-setup methodology. All acceptance criteria pass. One minor advisory (tsup.config.ts ESLint ignore) is the correct call and is documented by the scaffolder. No blockers.

npm_workspaces_declared.note: packages/*, apps/*, contracts all declared upfront. npm 10 tolerates missing globs with a warning — contracts and apps/* dirs appear in Task 2+. This is the correct approach per task-1.md §Edge cases bullet.

esm_only_exports.note: exports map contains only 'import' branch, no 'require'. No 'main' field. type=module. Verified in packages/middleware/package.json.

no_require_branch.note: Confirmed: exports['.'] has only 'types' and 'import'. ESM-only invariant holds.

typescript_strict.note: strict:true, noUncheckedIndexedAccess, noImplicitOverride, exactOptionalPropertyTypes, verbatimModuleSyntax all present. Appropriate for an ESM-only library; verbatimModuleSyntax enforces import type discipline which is desirable for tree-shaking and ESM interop clarity.

tsconfig_exclude_test_tree.note: exclude includes 'src/__tests__' (not root-level __tests__) per systemic-fix §2. Correct.

tsup_esm_only.note: format: ['esm'] only. dts:true, sourcemap:true, target:node20, splitting:false, treeshake:true, minify:false. Artifacts confirmed: dist/index.js, dist/index.d.ts, dist/index.js.map all present.

dist_artifacts.note: dist/index.js is ESM (sourceMappingURL present, no CJS require). dist/index.d.ts exports {}. Sizes are small (placeholder module) — expected.

vitest_root_level.note: vitest@^1.5.0 in root devDependencies. npm ls vitest --workspace=@universal-paywall/middleware shows vitest@1.6.1 resolved. §9 iteration-3-addendum satisfied.

middleware_devdeps_complete.note: All 7 required devDeps present: tsup, typescript, tsx, vitest, ajv, pino, winston. T6 will not need additional npm install.

passWithNoTests_pin.note: test script is 'vitest run --passWithNoTests'. Sibling key '//test' documents the pin rule. Both present per §5 iteration-4-addendum.

test_e2e_script.note: test:e2e script present: 'vitest run src/__tests__/integration/ --passWithNoTests'. Correct per systemic-fix §9.

husky_v9_prepare.note: prepare script is 'husky' (husky v9 no-arg form). .husky/pre-commit is chmod +x (-rwxr-xr-x). Husky v9 sets core.hooksPath=.husky/_ shim automatically after npm install.

pre_commit_gitleaks.note: Hook checks 'command -v gitleaks' and exits 1 with instructions if missing. Fail-hard semantics correct. gitleaks protect --staged --redact runs first, then npm run lint.

pre_commit_lint_scope.note: Root lint script is 'eslint packages/middleware --ext .ts,.cts,.mts,.tsx' — scoped to middleware only. contracts/ not linted by this hook per systemic-fix §pre-commit lint scope.

eslint_ignore_contracts.note: contracts/ and apps/ in ignorePatterns. ESLint will not attempt to parse Solidity or future apps/ code.

eslint_tsup_config_ignore.note: tsup.config.ts added to ignorePatterns because it is not in tsconfig.json include and parserOptions.project would error. The alternative (tsconfig.eslint.json) adds complexity not required by spec. Scaffolder's judgment call is correct — tsup.config.ts is build tooling, not library source. No action needed.

eslint_config_format.note: .eslintrc.cjs (CJS extension) required because root package.json has type=module. Using __dirname in parserOptions is correct for CJS context.

prettier_config.note: .prettierrc: singleQuote, semi, trailingComma:all, printWidth:100, tabWidth:2, arrowParens:always — matches spec. .prettierignore covers dist/, node_modules/, *.sol and other build artifacts.

gitleaks_toml.note: .gitleaks.toml with [extend] useDefault=true and empty [allowlist]. Correct minimal config that inherits all default secret patterns. Future tasks can extend allowlist for RPC URLs if needed.

gitignore_additions.note: .husky/_/ correctly ignored (husky v9 auto-generates this shim dir). Foundry contract paths (contracts/out/, contracts/cache/, contracts/broadcast/, contracts/.env, contracts/node_modules/) are appropriate additions even though they originate from Task 2 concurrent teammate — correct merge, not a conflict.

index_placeholder.note: packages/middleware/src/index.ts contains 'export {};'. tsup builds it cleanly. Task 8 will replace with real exports.

engines_node_20.note: engines.node >=20 on both root and packages/middleware package.json.

publish_config.note: publishConfig.access=public, publishConfig.provenance=true present in packages/middleware/package.json. Ready for Task 16 npm publish.

no_secrets_committed.note: No .env files, private keys, or credential files in the diff. .gitignore covers all secret patterns.

smoke_verification.note: Scaffolder confirmed: npm install success (node 20.19.1, npm 10.8.2), lint exit 0, typecheck exit 0, build exit 0 (dist artifacts present), npm test exit 0 (vitest 1.6.1 with --passWithNoTests), npx vitest --version 1.6.1, ESM module loads cleanly.

findings.title: tsup.config.ts excluded from ESLint via ignorePatterns
findings.description: The scaffolder added **/tsup.config.ts to ignorePatterns because it is not in tsconfig.json's include array and parserOptions.project causes 'TSConfig does not include this file' errors. This is the correct pragmatic solution — tsup.config.ts is build tooling, not library source code. The alternative (a separate tsconfig.eslint.json) adds complexity without spec benefit.

overall_assessment: All 30 acceptance criteria from task-1.md pass. Infrastructure methodology phases 1-7 are complete: TypeScript strict ESM-only package initialized, folder structure created (src/index.ts placeholder), no Docker (not required), .gitignore covers all secret patterns, pre-commit hooks in place (gitleaks + lint), vitest installed and passes --passWithNoTests, documentation deferred to Task 7 per spec. One low-severity advisory about tsup.config.ts ESLint ignore pattern — scaffolder's judgment is sound, no remediation needed.
